title: LimX首席财务官：中国机器人产业还不够拥挤
summary: Jesse Liu, CFO of Shenzhen‑based robotics company LimX Dynamics, says China’s humanoid robotics industry is “not crowded enough,” citing insufficient resource allocation and a shortage of reserved talent. (Source: Bloomberg)（原题：LimX CFO: China's Robotics Industry Not Crowded Enough）
